title: Sprite (disambiguation)
content:
'''Sprite''' may refer to one of the following:

==Canon==
*'''[[Sprite]]''', a [[Foodstuff|beverage]] found on [[Batuu]]

==Legends==
*[[Sprite (creature)|'''Sprite''']], a [[Species|creature]] from [[Kashyyyk/Legends|Kashyyyk]]
*'''''[[Spritespray]]''''', a medium [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] of the [[Galactic Federation of Free Alliances|Galactic Alliance]]
*'''[[Lucksprite/Legends|Lucksprite]]''', a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] species found on [[Endor/Legends|Endor]]
*'''[[Wodanian wood-sprite]]''', an organism from the [[Wodan system/Legends|Wodan system]]

{{Disambig}}
